summary: Retested Payments waLink fix and More staff tab. Payments page fully fixed. More page: staff tab visible and form renders, but saving a new staff crashes the app with a React error and the staff-list is wiped instead of appended.
passed: Admin login (admin@kirana.shop/admin123) succeeds and redirects to /
/payments loads with NO runtime error (waLink fix confirmed)
2 whatsapp-remind anchors render only for overdue wholesalers (Gupta, Sharma); href starts with https://wa.me/91 and contains encoded 'Namaste'
Non-overdue rows (DUE SOON, ON TIME) do NOT render Remind button
/more shows all 4 tabs: tab-prices, tab-inventory, tab-reorder, tab-staff
Clicking tab-staff shows staff-list and add-staff-btn
Staff form fields present: staff-form-name, staff-form-email, staff-form-password, save-staff-btn
Regression: /login and /register still load and render email input

failed.issue: Clicking save-staff-btn triggers a React 'Uncaught runtime error: Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {type, loc, msg, input, ctx})'. Backend returns 422 (FastAPI validation error) and the frontend renders the raw error object as a React child, crashing the tree. staff-list item count drops from 1 to 0 after save instead of appending the new staff.
failed.evidence: console: 'Failed to load resource: 422' on save; pageerror: 'Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {type, loc, msg, input, ctx})'; staff-list items: 1 -> 0 after save; full-screen red 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay captured in screenshot.

action_items: In More.jsx staff save handler: (a) do not render the raw error response as a React child — extract err.response.data.detail (which may be a list of Pydantic error dicts) and coerce to string or map .msg. (b) investigate the 422 root cause: inspect the POST payload vs the backend staff-create schema (likely a field name/type mismatch, e.g. role/shop_id/password requirements).
Ensure the save handler does not clear/replace staff-list state on failure — current code appears to reset it to empty on error.
